projectDescription: Comprehensive data engineering technical assessment covering ETL pipelines, SQL optimization, and ML fraud detection
keyFeatures: Text file parsing and data extraction for energy sector data
Advanced Pandas data manipulation and merging operations
MySQL database design with performance optimization
Temperature conversion and data aggregation pipelines
Random Forest fraud detection model with 98.8% AUC-ROC
Comprehensive data preprocessing with missing value handling
publicApiSurface: Data Loading: Custom parser for OFEI plant data files
Data Manipulation: Pandas merge and aggregation functions
SQL Optimization: Indexing, partitioning, and dimensional modeling
Temperature Conversion: Celsius to Fahrenheit aggregation
Delta Calculation: LAG window functions for temperature changes
RandomForestClassifier: Fraud detection model with 200 estimators
Model Evaluation: Confusion matrix, classification report, ROC-AUC
